full_text:
Liu Shan (Gongsi) 劉禪 (公嗣)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Shan (劉禪), styledGongsi (公嗣), was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. His reign of forty years gradually destroyed Shu through ineptitude. Liu Shan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom, the Wei Kingdom, and the Jin Dynasty. Liu Shan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
